2604.28028.title: Reliable Answers for Recurring Questions: Boosting Text-to-SQL Accuracy with Template Constrained Decoding
2604.28028.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have revolutionized Text-to-SQL generation, allowing users to query structured data using natural language with growing ease. Yet, real-world deployment remains challenging, especially in complex or unseen schemas, due to inconsistent accuracy and the risk of generating invalid SQL. We introduce Template Constrained Decoding (TeCoD), a system that addresses these limitations by harnessing the recurrence of query patterns in labeled workloads. TeCoD converts historical NL-SQL pairs into reusable templates and introduces a robust template selection module that uses a fine-tuned natural language inference model to match or reject queries efficiently. Once the template is selected, TeCoD enforces it during SQL generation through grammar-constrained decoding, implemented via a novel partitioned strategy that ensures both syntactic validity and efficiency. Together, these components yield up to 36% higher execution accuracy than in-context learning (ICL) and 2.2x lower latency on matched queries.
2604.28028.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）已經徹底改變了文本到 SQL 的生成，使用戶能夠以越來越簡單的方式使用自然語言查詢結構化數據。<lb/>然而，實際部署仍然面臨挑戰，尤其是在複雜或未見過的架構中，因為準確性不一致以及生成無效 SQL 的風險。我們介紹了模板約束解碼（TeCoD），這是一個通過利用標記工作負載中查詢模式的重複性來解決這些限制的系統。<lb/>TeCoD 將歷史 NL-SQL 對轉換為可重用的模板，並引入了一個強大的模板選擇模塊，該模塊使用微調的自然語言推理模型來有效地匹配或拒絕查詢。<lb/>一旦選擇了模板，TeCoD 在 SQL 生成過程中通過語法約束解碼來強制執行它，這是通過一種新穎的分區策略實現的，該策略確保了語法有效性和效率。<lb/>這些組件共同使得執行準確性比上下文學習（ICL）提高了高達 36%，並且在匹配查詢上延遲降低了 2.2 倍。
2604.28028.author: Smit Jivani et.al.
2604.28028.authors: Smit Jivani, Sarvam Maheshwari, Sunita Sarawagi
